case_title: JACKLYN JONES VS. YELLOW CAB et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $95.00) SERVED DEC-31-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SINGH, SURINDER

DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SURINDER SINGH PRESENT. A PREVIOUS ACTION SEEKING DAMAGES FOR PERSONAL INJURIES, BASED ON THE SAME FACTS WAS FILED IN SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT ( ACTION NO. 433005), WAS SUBSEQUENTLY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT SURINDER SINGH'S EXHIBIT RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
